name: RebarItem
summary: The RebarItem class contains information from the rebars in the catalog (rebar_database.inp).

constructors.name: RebarItem
constructors.summary: Creates a new rebar item instance.

methods.name: Delete
methods.summary: Deletes the rebar item from the rebar database.

methods.name: Export
methods.summary: Exports the rebar item in the catlog to given file name. If path is not given rebar is exported to model folder. If filename is empty rebar name is used as filename.

params.name: filename
params.doc: The export file name of the item.

methods.name: Insert
methods.summary: Inserts the rebar item in the rebar database.

methods.name: Modify
methods.signature: public bool Modify(string OriginalGrade, string OriginalSize, string OriginalUsage)
methods.summary: Modifies the rebar item in the rebar database based on the given parameters.

params.name: OriginalGrade
params.doc: Original Grade

params.name: OriginalSize
params.doc: Original Size

params.name: OriginalUsage
params.doc: Original Usage

methods.name: Select(String, String)
methods.signature: public bool Select(string Grade, string Size)
methods.summary: Selects the rebar item in the rebar database.

params.name: Grade
params.doc: The grade of the rebar item to select.

params.name: Size
params.doc: The size of the rebar item to select.

methods.name: Select(String, Double, Boolean)
methods.signature: public bool Select(string Grade, double NominalDiameter, bool UseNominalDiameter)
methods.summary: Selects the rebar item in the rebar database.

params.name: Grade
params.doc: The grade of the rebar item to select.

params.name: NominalDiameter
params.doc: The diameter of the rebar item to select.

params.name: UseNominalDiameter
params.doc: If set to false, the item is selected based on the actual diameter. If true, the item is selected based on the nominal diameter.

methods.name: Select(String, String, Double)
methods.signature: public bool Select(string Grade, string Size, double BendRadius)
methods.summary: Selects the rebar item in the rebar database.

params.name: Grade
params.doc: The grade of the rebar item to select.

params.name: Size
params.doc: The size of the rebar item to select.

params.name: BendRadius
params.doc: The bending radius of the rebar item to select.

methods.name: Select(String, String, String)

methods.summary: Selects the rebar item in the rebar database.

params.name: Grade
params.doc: The grade of the rebar item to select.

params.name: Size
params.doc: The size of the rebar item to select.

params.name: Usage
params.doc: The usage of the rebar item to select.

params.doc: The grade of the rebar item to select.

params.name: BendRadius

params.name: UseNominalDiameter

methods.name: Select(String, Double, String, Boolean)
methods.signature: public bool Select(string Grade, double Diameter, string Usage, bool UseNominalDiameter)
methods.summary: Selects the rebar item in the rebar database.

params.name: Grade
params.doc: The grade of the rebar item to select.

params.name: Diameter
params.doc: The diameter of the rebar item to select.

params.name: Usage
params.doc: The usage of the rebar item to select.

params.name: UseNominalDiameter
params.doc: If set to false, the item is selected based on the actual diameter. If true, the item is selected based on the nominal diameter.

properties.name: ActualDiameter
properties.summary: The rebar item's actual diameter.

properties.name: BendRadius
properties.summary: The rebar item's bending radius.

properties.name: Code
properties.summary: The rebar item's code.

properties.name: CrankedLength
properties.summary: Gets or sets the cranked length.

properties.name: CrankedLengthType
properties.summary: Gets or sets the cranked length type.

properties.name: CrankExtraOffset
properties.summary: Gets or sets the crank extra offset.

properties.name: CrankStraightLength
properties.summary: Gets or sets the crank straight length.

properties.name: CrossSectionArea
properties.summary: The rebar item's cross section area.

properties.name: CurveTolerance
properties.summary: Gets or sets the curve tolerance.

properties.name: ExtraPointShortening
properties.summary: Gets or sets the extra point shortening.

properties.name: Grade
properties.summary: The rebar item's grade.

properties.name: HookLength135Degrees
properties.summary: The rebar item's hook length for 135 degrees.

properties.name: HookLength180Degrees
properties.summary: The rebar item's hook length for 180 degrees.

properties.name: HookLength90Degrees
properties.summary: The rebar item's hook length for 90 degrees.

properties.name: HookRadius135Degrees
properties.summary: The rebar item's hook radius for 135 degrees.

properties.name: HookRadius180Degrees
properties.summary: The rebar item's hook radius for 180 degrees.

properties.name: HookRadius90Degrees
properties.summary: The rebar item's hook radius for 90 degrees.

properties.name: LapLength
properties.summary: Gets or sets the lap length.

properties.name: MaxRadiusRequiringBending
properties.summary: Gets or sets the max radius requiring bending.

properties.name: NominalDiameter
properties.summary: The rebar item's nominal diameter.

properties.name: Size
properties.summary: The rebar item's size.

properties.name: Usage
properties.summary: The rebar item's usage.

properties.summary: The rebar item's weight per lenght.
